# Heading

Use `Heading` patterns when section and page titles need consistent spacing and typography.

## When to Use

- Page and card headings
- Reusable content section headers

## Built From

- Custom typography wrapper patterns

## What Shadcn Adds

- Shared sizing and hierarchy conventions across surfaces

## Installation

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add heading
```

## Example Patterns

- Vanilla: page or section title
- Contextual: card header or settings section intro
